title: Ghataprabha Wildlife Sanctuary
tagline: Ghataprabha Wildlife Sanctuary — wildlife reserve of Karnataka

overview.short: Ghataprabha Wildlife Sanctuary also known as Ghataprabha Bird Sanctuary is a protected area and wildlife sanctuary located in the Belagavi district of the Indian state of Karnataka
overview.description: Ghataprabha Wildlife Sanctuary also known as Ghataprabha Bird Sanctuary is a protected area and wildlife sanctuary located in the Belagavi district of the Indian state of Karnataka covering an area of 29.78 km². It is situated along the banks of the Ghataprabha River and is renowned for its diverse bird population, particularly migratory species that visit during the winter months. It includes the reservoir created by the Dhupdal Dam, which was constructed in 1883, as well as over 22 small islands located within the river. The sanctuary is located roughly 70 km from the city of Belagavi.

topPlaces.name: Konnur (Rural)
topPlaces.description: Konnur is a city in Gokak taluk, Belgaum district in Karnataka, India. The Konnur railway station (Gokak road) is located in Konnur 11 km from Gokak.

topPlaces.name: Konnur
topPlaces.description: Konnur is a municipal council in the Belagavi District of Karnataka, India. It is located at 16.2°N 74.75°E / 16.2; 74.75 and has an average elevation of 606 metres (1988 feet).

topPlaces.name: Ghataprabha
topPlaces.description: Ghataprabha is a village in the north of the Indian state of Karnataka. It is located in the Gokak taluk of Belgaum district in Karnataka.

topPlaces.name: Gokak Falls
topPlaces.description: The Gokak Falls is a waterfall located on the Ghataprabha River in Belagavi district of Karnataka, India. The waterfall is 6.5 kilometers away from Gokak town.

topPlaces.name: Shivapur, Belgaum
topPlaces.description: Shivapur is a village in Belgaum district of Karnataka, India.

topPlaces.name: Gokak Falls, Belgaum
topPlaces.description: Gokak Falls is a town in Belagavi district in the Indian state of Karnataka. It is under the control of municipal corporation Konnur, Karnataka.

topPlaces.name: Pamaladinni
topPlaces.description: Pamaladinni is a village in the southern state of Karnataka, India. It is located in the Gokak taluk of Belagavi district in Karnataka.

topPlaces.name: Shiragaon

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Ghataprabha Wildlife Sanctuary?
faq.a: The best time to visit Ghataprabha Wildlife Sanctuary is Oct – Mar. Summers are 26–40°C and winters are 12–28°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Ghataprabha Wildlife Sanctuary?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Belagavi Airport (42 km) and the nearest railway station is Hubballi Junction (106 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Ghataprabha Wildlife Sanctuary?
faq.a: 3 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Ghataprabha Wildlife Sanctuary at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Ghataprabha Wildlife Sanctuary?
faq.a: Stays in Ghataprabha Wildlife Sanctuary start from ₹2,500 per night, with options across 5 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Ghataprabha Wildlife Sanctuary?
faq.a: The top attractions are Konnur (Rural), Konnur, Ghataprabha, Gokak Falls, Shivapur, Belgaum.
